pre_arrival_tasks.description: Email signed offer letter and welcome package to new hire.
Initiate background screening via Checkr; await clearance.
Order and configure laptop with standard software image.
Set up Active Directory / SSO account and email mailbox.
Reserve workspace; issue physical access badge.
Send benefits enrollment link (30-day window).
Invite to company Slack and add to department channels.
Enter new hire in payroll system; confirm bank details.

first_day_tasks.description: 30-min intro call to discuss role, team, and first-week goals.
Tour facilities or introduce to remote team via video call.
Deliver laptop, peripherals, and access credentials.
Collect identity documents; file W-4 and state equivalents.
Complete mandatory security-awareness course in LMS.
Arrange team lunch (in-person) or virtual coffee chat.

first_week_tasks.description: Configure Jira, GitHub, Salesforce or relevant tools.
Review and acknowledge Employee Handbook in HR portal.
Complete GDPR / HIPAA / SOC2 compliance modules in LMS.
Draft initial OKRs with manager; upload to performance system.
Pair new hire with an experienced colleague for peer mentoring.
Attend departmental overview session or watch recording.
Schedule 15-min intros with cross-functional partners.

additional_notes: Remote employee — ship equipment to home address.

Order and configure laptop with standard software image.
Set up Active Directory / SSO account and email mailbox.
Reserve workspace; issue physical access badge.
Send benefits enrollment link (30-day window).
Invite to company Slack and add to department channels.
Enter new hire in payroll system; confirm bank details.

first_day_tasks.description: 30-min intro call to discuss role, team, and first-week goals.
Tour facilities or introduce to remote team via video call.
Deliver laptop, peripherals, and access credentials.
Collect identity documents; file W-4 and state equivalents.
Complete mandatory security-awareness course in LMS.
Arrange team lunch (in-person) or virtual coffee chat.

first_week_tasks.description: Configure Jira, GitHub, Salesforce or relevant tools.
Review and acknowledge Employee Handbook in HR portal.
Complete GDPR / HIPAA / SOC2 compliance modules in LMS.
Draft initial OKRs with manager; upload to performance system.
Pair new hire with an experienced colleague for peer mentoring.
Attend departmental overview session or watch recording.
Schedule 15-min intros with cross-functional partners.

additional_notes: On-site role; badge activation required day 1.
